positive: A vibrant, abstract geometric illustration inspired by retro 70s aesthetics. The image features interconnected shapes, stylized celestial bodies (moon, stars), and flowing liquid elements. The color palette is rich and saturated: burnt orange, deep teal, mustard yellow, and cream. Style: Memphis Design, psychedelic art, vaporwave, vector graphic, clean lines, bold composition, highly detailed, poster art, 8k.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, organic, soft edges, messy, realistic, sketch, grunge
